children.text: Tom makes clothes for animals. He's busy every day!
children.cn: 汤姆为动物做衣服。他每天都忙！
children.explanation: 文中说'Tom makes clothes for animals'，是为动物做衣服。

children.text: Animals: "We need clothes for a party!"
children.cn: 动物们："我们需要派对的衣服！"
children.statement: 动物们需要工作时穿的衣服。
children.explanation: 他们说的是for a party(派对)，不是for work(工作)。

children.cn: 动物："我的家人想要五颜六色的衬衫！"
children.statement: 这个动物的家人想要蓝色的衬衫。
children.explanation: 说的是colourful(五颜六色的)，不是blue(蓝色的)。

children.text: Frog: "I have eight brothers and sisters. We all look the same!"
children.cn: 青蛙："我有八个兄弟姐妹。我们都长得一样！"
children.explanation: 它说'I have eight brothers and sisters'。

children.text: Frog: "Dad gets our names wrong. Can you help?"
children.cn: 青蛙："爸爸把我们的名字搞错了。你能帮忙吗？"
children.notes: "Gets names wrong" means confuses who is who.
children.statement: 青蛙的爸爸能分清它们的名字。
children.explanation: 文中说'Dad gets our names wrong'，是搞错了，不是分清了。

children.text: Frog: "Now we're wearing T-shirts with our names. Clever idea!"
children.cn: 青蛙："现在我们穿着印有名字的T恤。聪明的主意！"
children.notes: "With our names" means having names printed on them.
children.statement: 青蛙们穿着印有名字的T恤。
children.explanation: 它说'we're wearing T-shirts with our names'。

children.text: Tom: "A birthday gift for Ms Whale? Let me think."
children.cn: 汤姆："给鲸鱼小姐的生日礼物？让我想想。"
children.notes: "Let me think" means Tom needs time to plan.
children.statement: 汤姆在想给鲸鱼小姐的生日礼物。
children.explanation: 他说'A birthday gift for Ms Whale? Let me think.'。

children.text: Here comes Mr Bird. He wants something special.
children.cn: 鸟先生来了。他想要特别的东西。
children.statement: 鸟先生想要普通的东西。
children.explanation: 文中说'something special'，是特别的，不是普通的。

children.text: The next day, Tom asks all the animals to come and help.
children.cn: 第二天，汤姆请所有动物来帮忙。
children.notes: "Come and help" means join in the work.
children.statement: 汤姆让所有动物来帮忙。
children.explanation: 文中说'Tom asks all the animals to come and help'。

children.notes: This is a question about the story outcome.
children.statement: 动物们在帮汤姆做拼布衣服。
children.explanation: 根据故事，他们一起制作拼布衣服。
